texto: Afterwards Isabelle often wondered if the moments themselves were greater or the memory of them. At least the memory did not pass, while the moments passed all too fast. Life whizzed by; she no longer had time to recollect it. Her notebooks to this day retain the story of her desperate attempt to hold together her self, her mind, her reason, her order, her morals.
explicacao: Citação de Toni Bentley sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Afterwards Isabelle often wondered if the moments themselves were greater or the memory of them. …” articula tempo, ballet, memory em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como memory.

texto: If a man can possess a woman sexually -really possess- he won't need to control her ideas, her opinions, her clothes, her friends, even her other lovers.
